Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Subject One]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Subject One is the father of the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Subject One has weakened techniques.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Subject One is a Dreadgod who was once a man warped by hunger aura and is the origin of their bloodline.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Subject One is the first product of experiments that created the Dreadgods and is sometimes called the fifth or first Dreadgod, the Father of Hunger, or the Slumbering Wraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Subject One waits at the bottom of the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — A small metal cube marked with a crescent moon contains the hand of Subject One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Subject One's attacks have intensified.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Subject One is an entity sealed in the labyrinth associated with hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon and his group are investigating to find Subject One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon wanted to keep a layer between them and the outside before revealing Subject One’s hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Subject One is a mummified left hand of chalk-white flesh that acts as the pulsing heart of the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Subject One possesses a borrowed authority that can pull Lindon toward doors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Subject One is controlling the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Subject One is unable to reach the group's current location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Subject One waits in a deep chamber at the center of the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Subject One has closed the way forward temporarily to fight the nature of the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon possesses the hand of Subject One in a silver case.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Subject One has a hand contained in a case.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Subject One was born from a tank in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Subject One's thoughts came from below Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Subject One has a birth pod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Subject One uses hunger madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Subject One is an entity within the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Subject One is the Slumbering Wraith.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Subject One is a six-armed man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Subject One has a gaping hole in his chest where his heart should be.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Subject One violated his oath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Subject One has control of himself again after death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Subject One is a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Subject One is the first child of hunger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Subject One is a prisoner in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — Subject One does not remember his name.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Subject One has a chamber with thin and gray light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Subject One has a throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 23''' — Subject One has an arm that Lindon can tear off.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The removal of Subject One causes the hunger aura to exceed containment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Subject One is a humanoid Dreadgod who held dominion over the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — The power of the labyrinth is the power of Subject One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Subject One's remaining will crashed into Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Subject One died in the labyrinth.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 2''' — Subject One implanted a dense knot of hunger in the labyrinth walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Subject One is associated with Lindon's white hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Subject One was a prisoner in the labyrinth and is now dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Subject One has a core binding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Subject One is restricted to the lower half of the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — Subject One was encountered in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 16''' — Subject One has an arm that helps Lindon crush the Dreadgod's will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Lindon has unleashed the arm of Subject One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Subject One has the ability to eat a call for help.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — The core binding of Subject One is a unique and irreplaceable material.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Subject One has an arm that Lindon must wrestle into submission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The labyrinth is fed with pieces of Subject One's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — The death of Subject One is a point of belief regarding when Dreadgods gained intelligence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Subject One's binding was worked into a horn.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — Lindon is traveling toward Subject One.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
